$comment: Trigger evals for the two skills in explain-panel-kit. These exercise the should-trigger / should-not-trigger boundary of each skill's description. Run with skill-creator's run_loop.py to tune triggering accuracy.

evals.prompt: I just inherited this FastAPI codebase and I need to understand the data flow from ingestion to response. Can you walk through it and produce something I can share with the new junior dev next week?

We're publishing internal docs next quarter. I need a structured map of how our Nuxt app handles a typical request — pages, server routes, state — saved somewhere I can hand-edit before generating the visual.
Run /explore-pipeline on this repo, the backend is in api/ and the front is in web/
Map out my project pipeline as JSON so I can hand it off to /explain-panel afterwards
Analyse my codebase end-to-end and write the result to docs/pipeline-map.json, I want to know what /explain-panel will see
Refactor my pipeline so it's faster — the embedding step is the bottleneck
Explain what RAG means and how cosine distance works in ChromaDB
Write tests for my ingestion pipeline so I can refactor it confidently
Why is my retrieval returning weird results? Looks like the embedding model changed
Document my API endpoints in OpenAPI format and publish them to Postman
I've already got docs/pipeline-map.json, now build the React component that visualises it. Tailwind is set up.
Generate the explain panel component from the pipeline map I edited yesterday — it's in docs/. Use the Nuxt SFC variant.
/explain-panel
Audit the pipeline map against the code, then create the accordion documentation panel for the project
Time to ship the explain UI — pull from docs/pipeline-map.json and drop the TSX into components/. Verify everything is in sync first.
Refactor my ExplainPanel component to use Solid.js signals instead of React state
Style the ExplainPanel with a different color palette — make it more brand-aligned
My ExplainPanel renders but the syntax highlighter doesn't load. Debug it.
Generate the pipeline map for this project — I haven't run /explore-pipeline yet
Convert this React component to Vue
